summary.headline: ADM reports Q3 2023 earnings per share of $1.52, adjusted EPS of $1.63.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company reported third quarter 2023 earnings with diluted EPS of $1.52, and adjusted EPS of $1.63. The company highlighted strong performance in Carbohydrate Solutions and noted a shift in Ag Services Oilseeds results. Segment operating profit was $1.421 billion, with adjusted segment operating profit of $1.492 billion. The company raised its full-year earnings outlook based on strong performance in 2023 and constructive expectations for the remainder of the year.

drivers: South American origination results were higher year-over-year
concerns: North American origination results were lower year-over-year
shift of exports to South America

drivers: Starches and Sweeteners subsegment results were higher year-over-year
Vantage Corn Processors results were significantly higher year-over-year
Flavors results were substantially higher than the prior year
Health Wellness showed favorable impact from revised commercial agreement with Spiber
concerns: Human Nutrition results were much lower than the third quarter of 2022
Specialty Ingredients results were much lower year-over-year due to lower market demand for plant-based proteins

drivers: Improved ADM Investor Services earnings on higher net interest income
concerns: Captive insurance results were slightly lower on higher claim settlements
